ShortDescription.Value: Modify attractiveness values for landmarks, parks, ect.

Publish.LongDescription:
### [ALPHA] Customize It **IMPORTANT:** Changes take effect immediately, but it can take **5 to 30 seconds** for the updated values to show up in the tourism menu.
### Attractiveness Editor Customize the attractiveness of any building that has an attractiveness score — landmarks, parks, tourist attractions, etc.
- Select any building with attractiveness and an **editor panel** appears - **Slider** to set attractiveness from 0 to 500 - One-click **Restore Default** to revert to vanilla values - Changes apply to **all buildings of the same type** - Overrides are **saved automatically** and persist across game restarts - To close the panel, click anywhere else
### Tourism Control Set a **target tourist count** for your city from the settings panel (Options → Customize It → Tourism).
- Slider from 0 to 20,000 tourists - **0 = disabled** (vanilla behavior) - The mod spawns and manages tourists to reach your target - Make sure you have enough hotels to accommodate your tourists
### Notes - To see an increase in tourism, it may take a full day cycle for new tourists to arrive
### Compatibility
- Safe to remove any time. Restore all overrides to default before uninstalling for clean vanilla values. - Does not use Harmony
### Languages
- English, French
Publish.ChangeLog: * Initial release. * Attractiveness editor panel with slider. * Persistent overrides across saves.
